name: Feature request
description: Suggest an enhancement for TPT Spectra
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: [enhancement]
body:
  - type: textarea
    id: problem
    attributes:
      label: Problem
      description: What problem would this feature solve?
    validations:
      required: true
  - type: textarea
    id: proposal
    attributes:
      label: Proposed solution
    validations:
      required: true
  - type: textarea
    id: alternatives
    attributes:
      label: Alternatives considered
